title: pavonia oxyphylla
intro: Pavonia oxyphylla, also known as the small rose mallow or rock rose, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pavonia oxyphylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Pavonia oxyphylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
